name: Blind Bartimaeus
oracleText:
When Blind Bartimaeus enters the battlefield, scry 2 and you gain 1 life.
Whenever you scry, target creature you control gains lifelink until end of turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.
flavorText: "Jesus, thou son of David, have mercy on me." — Mark 10:47
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses El Greco's "Christ Healing the Blind" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Crying for Mercy

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: El Greco, Christ Healing the Blind
classics.sourceNotes: A strong blind-healing scene stands in well for Bartimaeus’s cry for mercy.
